texto: We all are so deeply interconnected
autor: we have no option but to love all. Be kind and do good for any one and that will be reflected. The ripples of the kind heart are the highest blessings of the Universe.
explicacao: Citação de we have no option but to love all. Be kind and do good for any one and that will be reflected. The ripples of the kind heart are the highest blessings of the Universe. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We all are so deeply interconnected” articula reflexao, amit-ray, deeply em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
